series.name: The Sentinel Trilogy
series.description: Follow the complete journey of The Sentinel Trilogy — an epic science fiction series exploring duty, sacrifice, and loyalty across the stars.

books.title: Sentinel's Dilemma
books.tagline: When duty and conscience collide, every choice has a cost.
description: The first book in The Sentinel Trilogy is now available! Join the journey as our protagonist faces impossible choices between duty and conscience.

In a world where loyalty is currency and betrayal is survival, one sentinel must decide what they truly stand for — even if standing means falling alone. The mission was supposed to be simple. It never is.
Sentinel's Dilemma launches an unforgettable trilogy that asks the questions that matter most: What do we owe the people who made us? And what do we owe ourselves?

books.tagline: The journey home is never the one you remember.
